calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, June 02, 2016 in Department 525:
No Appearance by Respondent/Plaintiff Leonie Oostrom
Vance Chang, Esq., counsel for Appellant/Defendant Chia-Pi Tien who is also present

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Chia-Pi Tien is sworn.
Appeal is granted by the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. No new evidence retained by the Court. Small Claims exhibits from Plaintiff retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
